questions.text: Who was Tan Sen?

questions.text: The common value among the people of Pakistan is:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Islam is the common value.
Islam is the common value.
Islam is the common value.

Pakistan is an Islamic country, and the teachings of Islam play a significant role in shaping the values of Pakistani society. Islamic values such as piety, honesty, compassion, and respect for elders are highly regarded.

questions.text: Lahore Resolution was passed in:
questions.subject: Pakistan Studies

options.explanation: Resolution was passed in 1940.

Fazlul Huq presented the historical Lahore resolution in 1940. The resolution text, unanimously approved by the Subject Committee, accepted the concept of a united homeland for Muslims and recommended the creation of an independent Muslim state.
Resolution was passed in 1940.
Resolution was passed in 1940.

questions.text: In Islam sovereignty belongs to:

options.explanation: In Islam sovereignty belongs to Allah Almighty.
